annotations.name: Aorta
annotations.description: The main artery carrying oxygenated blood from the heart to the body.

annotations.name: Left Atrium
annotations.description: Receives oxygen-rich blood returning from the lungs.

annotations.name: Right Atrium
annotations.description: Receives oxygen-poor blood returning from the body.

annotations.name: Left Ventricle
annotations.description: Pumps oxygen-rich blood into the aorta and across the body.

annotations.name: Right Ventricle
annotations.description: Pumps oxygen-poor blood toward the lungs for oxygenation.

annotations.name: Coronary Arteries
annotations.description: Blood vessels that supply oxygen and nutrients to the heart muscle.
